description: Create a dynamic houseplant watering schedule using date formulas, conditional logic, and conditional formatting to manage plant care priorities. Ensure the schedule is sorted by urgency and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/watering_schedule.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a collection of houseplants that need watering on different schedules. Create a spreadsheet that calculates when each plant needs to be watered next, how many days until watering, and priority level. Apply visual formatting to highlight urgent plants and sort by due date.
